---
name: Academic / expert review
about: For physicists and domain experts (human or AI) to verify or correct a catalogue entry
title: "[review] Problem #NN — <short note>"
labels: ["review", "needs-triage"]
---

Thank you for reviewing. This is an **AI-reviewed meta-analysis** (see
`docs/AI_REVIEW.md`); expert verification is exactly what it needs. Corrections
are credited. Please keep to one problem per issue where possible.

**Problem reviewed:** #NN — <slug/title>

**Your vantage point:** (e.g. "I work on Cauchy-horizon stability" / "GPT-5 run of
the verification prompt" / "general reader")

### Findings (fill what applies)

- [ ] **Problem statement** — is it an accurate description of a genuinely *open*
  question? Anything actually resolved?
- [ ] **Papers** — any that don't exist, have wrong authors/year, or are
  mischaracterized? (List the entries.)
- [ ] **Physicists** — any attributed contribution that is inaccurate?
- [ ] **Truth tier** — is the assigned tier defensible?
- [ ] **Missing / miscategorized** — important work or framing that's absent?
- [ ] **Ranking** — is the difficulty/age/tractability placement reasonable?

### Details and citations

<your notes; please cite arXiv/DOI where you can>

---
*If you are running the multi-model verification prompt from `docs/AI_REVIEW.md`,
please paste which model and the structured verdict.*
